title: Dutch Roast Uni Tart
description: A savory tart that combines the flavors of roast and uni with a hint of bitterness.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
In a skillet, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the roast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the uni and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the leaf and remove from heat.
Spread the mixture onto the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border.
Drizzle with honey and fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
